name: aming-claw
description: Codex plugin packaging for Aming Claw governance skills and MCP tools.

interface.longDescription: Provides the Aming Claw session skill and MCP configuration so agents start with graph-first discovery, backlog/MF discipline, ServiceManager-aware runtime checks, and dashboard governance context.
defaultPrompt: Use $aming-claw before changing dashboard or governance code.
Use $aming-claw to run graph-first MF work in aming-claw.
Use $aming-claw to inspect MCP, graph, and backlog state.
